MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Nov-20-2001 Denied

Motion To Quash Service Of Summons Or Stay Or Dismiss
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: R. Boyd McSparran, Esq. 621-5600 for pltf & opposing party; Joyce Jordan, Esq. 922-4163 for deft & moving party.
RULING: The Court announced its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to quash denied, process server's declaration establishes service.
Argued and the Court denies the motion, 5 days to "answer." Order signed in open court.

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Nov-19-2001 Continued To Nov-20-01 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

RULING: Argued and the Court continues the matter to 11/20/01.
